title: Make explicit user preferences available to the Atthis workbench
sources: human mandate, 2026-07-19: choose option A for explicit Atthis preferences

mainline.contradiction: Atthis can recover projects and tasks, but stable personal defaults, machine-local overrides, and inferred observations have no distinct authority or delivery path, so agents either forget them or over-promote memory into policy.
acceptance: Natural-language preference requests are lowered into explicit user or machine-scoped records without requiring the human to know CLI syntax.
Only user-declared preferences become active; inferred observations remain non-authoritative and project-shared constraints remain in the target repository.

A query returns only applicable compact preferences with deterministic precedence, supports retirement with an audit receipt, and does not expose secrets or silently turn defaults into hard constraints.
